name: Seed Rate Calculator
description: Industrial-grade seed rate calculator for precision agriculture, incorporating ISO 5692, Six Sigma DMAIC, and Lean principles to optimize planting density, minimize waste, and maximize yield.

inputs.label: Target Plant Population (plants/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Desired final stand count per hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired final stand count per hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.

inputs.label: Germination Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate under optimal conditions, typically from seed lot analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate under optimal conditions, typically from seed lot analysis.

inputs.label: Field Emergence Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of germinated seeds that emerge as healthy seedlings, accounting for soil conditions, pests, and weather.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of germinated seeds that emerge as healthy seedlings, accounting for soil conditions, pests, and weather.

inputs.label: Seed Weight (g per 1000 seeds)
inputs.businessContext: Thousand kernel weight (TKW) from seed supplier or lab test, used to convert seed count to mass.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thousand kernel weight (TKW) from seed supplier or lab test, used to convert seed count to mass.

inputs.label: Row Spacing (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Distance between planting rows, typically set by planter configuration and crop type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between planting rows, typically set by planter configuration and crop type.

inputs.label: Planter Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Operational efficiency of the planter accounting for skips, doubles, and mechanical losses (Lean OEE metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Operational efficiency of the planter accounting for skips, doubles, and mechanical losses (Lean OEE metric).

inputs.label: Seed Cost per Unit ($/kg)
inputs.businessContext: Purchase price of seed per kilogram, used for economic analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase price of seed per kilogram, used for economic analysis.

inputs.label: Expected Yield Value ($/tonne)
inputs.businessContext: Market price per tonne of harvested crop, used for ROI calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market price per tonne of harvested crop, used for ROI calculations.

inputs.label: Soil Type
inputs.businessContext: Soil texture classification affecting emergence factor and recommended seeding depth.

businessContext_i18n.en: Soil texture classification affecting emergence factor and recommended seeding depth.

inputs.label: Irrigation Available
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if supplemental irrigation is used, influencing emergence and target population.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if supplemental irrigation is used, influencing emergence and target population.

rules.message: Germination rate should not be lower than field emergence factor. Check input values.
Target population outside typical range for most row crops. Verify agronomic recommendation.
Narrow rows with low planter efficiency may cause significant seed spacing variability.

thresholds.message: Germination rate below 80%: consider seed treatment or replanting plan.
Seed cost exceeds $20/kg: evaluate economic viability with ROI analysis.
Planter efficiency below 85%: perform Six Sigma root cause analysis to reduce losses.
